# doit_cloud_diagram_search (Data Source)

Cloud Diagrams visualize your cloud infrastructure and resource relationships.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Search for Cloud Diagram layers and components by name
data "doit_cloud_diagram_search" "example" {
  query = "production"
}

# Access matching diagram layers (includes layer IDs for use with other data sources)
output "matching_layers" {
  value = [for s in data.doit_cloud_diagram_search.example.scheme : {
    layer_id     = s.ss_id
    diagram_name = s.scheme
    account_name = s.account_name
  }]
}

# Access matching components
output "matching_components" {
  value = [for c in data.doit_cloud_diagram_search.example.component : {
    name     = c.name
    type     = c.type
    layer_id = c.ss_id
  }]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `query` (String) Search query string.

### Optional

- `from` (Number) Pagination offset (default 0). In auto-pagination mode, sets the starting offset.
- `size` (Number) Maximum number of results per category. When set, disables auto-pagination and returns a single page.
- `ss_id` (String) Limit search to components within this layer.
- `timeouts` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `component` (Attributes List) Components matching the query by name. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--component))
- `id` (String) A deterministic hash of the query parameters, used as the data source identifier.
- `prop` (Attributes List) Components matching the query by property values. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--prop))
- `scheme` (Attributes List) Diagram layers (cloud accounts) matching the query. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--scheme))

<a id="nestedatt--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `read` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).


<a id="nestedatt--component"></a>
### Nested Schema for `component`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Component ID.
- `account_name` (String) Cloud account name.
- `color` (String) Component color.
- `group_type` (String) Group type (for group components).
- `icon` (String) Component icon identifier.
- `name` (String) Component name.
- `node_type` (String) Node type.
- `props` (Attributes) Component properties. For the "prop" category contains the matched property key-value pairs. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--component--props))
- `scheme_id` (String) Parent diagram ID.
- `ss_id` (String) Layer ID.
- `type` (String) Component type.

<a id="nestedatt--component--props"></a>
### Nested Schema for `component.props`

Read-Only:

- `service_type` (String) Cloud service type (e.g. AWS::EC2::Instance).



<a id="nestedatt--prop"></a>
### Nested Schema for `prop`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Component ID.
- `account_name` (String) Cloud account name.
- `color` (String) Component color.
- `group_type` (String) Group type (for group components).
- `icon` (String) Component icon identifier.
- `name` (String) Component name.
- `node_type` (String) Node type.
- `props` (Attributes) Component properties. For the "prop" category contains the matched property key-value pairs. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--prop--props))
- `scheme_id` (String) Parent diagram ID.
- `ss_id` (String) Layer ID.
- `type` (String) Component type.

<a id="nestedatt--prop--props"></a>
### Nested Schema for `prop.props`

Read-Only:

- `service_type` (String) Cloud service type (e.g. AWS::EC2::Instance).



<a id="nestedatt--scheme"></a>
### Nested Schema for `scheme`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Layer ID.
- `account_name` (String) Cloud account name.
- `name` (String) Layer name.
- `scheme` (String) Parent diagram name.
- `scheme_id` (String) Parent diagram ID.
- `ss_id` (String) Layer ID (same as _id).
- `status` (String) Import/sync status.
- `type` (String) Component type — always "statussheet" for this category.
